message.thinking: We need to produce JSON array of 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". The "question" field should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending on which question we are answering. Provide feedback. The text is a table of tasks with dates. The questions: 1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list chapters, only tasks. So answer false. Provide feedback: It only lists tasks, not sections. 2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. Provide feedback: No description. 3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, it's just tasks. So false. Provide feedback: Not clear. So all false. Provide JSON array.
